PEOPLE'S OPPOSITION TO DEFT'S DEMURRER FILED

/CAL:SENTENCE/TWS/CH5:ISS:CPROB:PROB 18 M:PJ 2 D/CTS:2/VF2:150/PROBREVFN/COA:40/ICNA/COLLECT/CTORD:VICTIM RESTITUTION PAYABLE TO PG&E IN THE AMOUNTOF $71,715,11/ /X:PAYMENT OF RESTITUTION SHALL BE JOINT AND SEVERAL WITH CO-DEFENDANT ODHRAN MCLAUGHLIN, COURT NUMBER 14011091,/MISD3/OBEY/ACCEP/4019HALF/DISM3/BE/

/CAL TO SET PRELIMINARY HEARING/X  THE PEOPLE'S ORAL MOTION TO AMEND THEOMPLAINT TO ADD COUNT 5, PC 415(2), A MISDEMEANOR, IS GRANTED,/FAWC/IRRC//TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OF NL/DEFT ADV NL: 5/NOLO/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/IBARRA/

/CAL:BW STAY/X:FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT FILED IN OPEN COURT/FAWC/IRRC/DEF:ENTERS A PLEA OF NOT GUILTY AS TO AMENDED COUNT 3/STWPX/BWSTAY:11-18-14//X:COURT CONFIRMS ERP ON 01-07-15/DOP/X:COURT CONFIRMS TO SET HEARING ON 01-12-15/DOP/TE: 4 HOURS/

/CAL:DEF REQUEST TO ADD TO CAL - 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT/TEXT:BENCH WARRANTSTAYED AND CONT'D/NP/X: NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT; A BENCH WARRANT IS ORDERED AND  STAYED TO 11-21-14/X: BAIL SET AT $130000/X:BAIL IS NOT FORFEITED AT THIS TIME/CONTD:BW STAY/DOP/

/CAL:DEMURRER/X:CERTIFIED LAW CLERK, ERIC HAWKINS APPEARS UNDER THE SUPERVISION OF OMAR FIGUEROA/X: DEMURRER IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND AS TOCOUNT 3 ONLY, DEMURRERSFOR COUNTS 1,2 & 4 ARE OVERRULED/CONTD:ERP & DA TOFILE AMENDED COMPLAINT ON 01-07-15/DOP/CONTD:TO SET ON 01-12-15/DOP/
